Stay. Explore. Connect.

SOIL VILLAGE

SOIL VALLEY – MANALI • 1 NIGHTS / 2 DAYS • Pickup Delhi

Escape to an exclusive wilderness glamping retreat hidden within Solang Valley. Experience cozy log fire bonfires, pristine alpine river streams, majestic peak trails, and premium stargazing comforts.

Book Now Explore Itinerary
Scroll to Discover
Chronological Track

CAMPING ITINERARY

SOLANG VALLEY RETREAT
01

DAY 1: BASE CAMP SETTLE

01

MEET & GREET

10:00 AM • El: 2,050m

Meet and greet at Renush sh Homestay, Soyal. Assembly briefing and guide allocation.

02

2 HOUR ALPINE TREK

11:30 AM • El: 2,300m

After that we proceed for a scenic 2 hour trek up the valley ridges passing pristine pine boundaries.

03

REACH CAMP & LUNCH

01:30 PM • El: 2,480m

Reach at camp, settle in premium glamping tents, and enjoy a hot wholesome mountain lunch.

04

RELAX & EVENING TEA

04:30 PM • El: 2,480m

After lunch, relax in the serene environment. Fresh herbal sunset tea served directly next to the river banks.

05

SNACKS & EXPLORATION

06:30 PM • El: 2,520m

Delicious warm starters served. Embark on a brief pine trail walk under rising twilight skies.

06

CAMPFIRE DINNER

08:30 PM • El: 2,480m

Warm fireside dinner and comfortable overnight stay at base camp under starlight.

02

DAY 2: HIGHLAND HIKING

01

EARLY TEA & SNACKS

06:00 AM • El: 2,480m

Early morning tea and snacks served at sunrise.

02

1 HOUR SUMMIT HIKING

07:30 AM • El: 2,710m

Proceed for a 1 hour morning hiking session and return to base camp.

03

LUNCH AT CAMP

01:00 PM • El: 2,480m

Fresh, piping-hot lunch served at camp.

04

RETURN HOMESTAY

02:30 PM • El: 2,050m

After lunch, pack up and return safely to Renush sh Homestay with beautiful memories.

1-2

DAY 1-2: DELHI – SHIMLA – RAMPUR

El: 1,350m • Delhi Departure

Board the overnight Volvo from Delhi to Shimla. On Day 2, drive past Narkanda and the historic Sarahan temple to Rampur for a quiet overnight stay.

03

DAY 3: RAMPUR – KALPA – TABO

El: 3,050m • Kinner Kailash

Drive through Kalpa, catching awe-inspiring views of the Kinner Kailash peak. Travel along the Indus-Spiti confluence via Nako to reach the ancient valley of Tabo.

04

DAY 4: TABO – KAZA

El: 3,650m • UNESCO Monastery

Explore the 1000-year-old Tabo Monastery, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Drive to Kaza, visiting the imposing Key Monastery perched on a mountain peak. Overnight in Kaza.

05

DAY 5: KAZA LOCAL EXPLORATION

El: 4,400m • Highest Villages

Journey to the highest inhabited villages on Earth: Langza (the Fossil Village), Hikkim (World's Highest Post Office), and Komik. Star-gaze in the crystal-clear night skies.

06

DAY 6: KAZA – CHICHAM BRIDGE – KIBBER

El: 4,120m • Asia's Highest Span

Cross the deep gorges of Chicham via Asia's highest suspension bridge. Explore Kibber Village sanctuary and hike along scenic cold desert peaks. Return to Kaza base camp.

7-9

DAY 7-9: KAZA – MANALI – DELHI

El: 2,050m • Return Loop

Cross the roaring Kunzum Pass to reach Manali on Day 7. Settle and relax in Manali on Day 8 before taking the return overnight Volvo, arriving in Delhi on Day 9 with a heart full of memories.

01

DAY 1: PRIVATE SUV PICKUP & COZY WELCOME

Private SUV • Floral Welcome

Depart in your private luxury SUV from Delhi to Solang Camp Base. Arrive to a stunning candlelit walkway entrance, fresh organic forest flowers, and warm premium local apple cider welcome drinks.

02

DAY 2: PRIVATE DOME GLAMPING & STARLIGHT BONFIRE

Heated Dome • Candlelight Pathway

Cozy up in your beautifully decorated heated geodesic dome. In the evening, enjoy a private stardust bonfire for two with customized wine bottles and traditional local acoustic music.

03

DAY 3: SUNRISE WALK & ROMANTIC PEAK PICNIC

Pine Ridge Walk • Valley View Picnic

A serene sunrise walk along high pine ridges. Followed by a luxury scenic valley picnic featuring custom organic delicacies, cheeses, and romantic mountain photography.

04

DAY 4: CHERRY-ON-TOP RETURN DRIVE

Manali Exploration • Sweet Departure

Enjoy a hearty breakfast in bed. Spend the afternoon exploring the scenic lanes of Manali before starting the return drive back to Delhi in your private premium SUV.

01

DAY 1: DELHI DEPARTURE → MANALI

Volvo Overnight

Board the overnight Volvo bus from Delhi. Scenic mountain journey. Arrival at Manali, check-in at comfortable family hotel. Welcome dinner included.

02

DAY 2: SOLANG VALLEY & ROHTANG PASS

El: 3,978m

Full day excursion to Solang Valley — snow activities, ropeway rides. Drive to Rohtang Pass for breathtaking views. Family lunch at a mountain dhaba. Bonfire in the evening.

03

DAY 3: MANALI LOCAL SIGHTSEEING

Top Attractions

Visit the iconic Hidimba Devi Temple, Manu Temple & Van Vihar. Explore Mall Road for local shopping and Himachali cuisine. Evening at leisure. Dinner and overnight stay.

04

DAY 4: DEPARTURE → DELHI

Sweet Return

After breakfast, check-out from hotel. Transfers to bus stand. Board the return Volvo back to Delhi — hearts full of family memories and stunning mountain photographs.

THE CAMPSITE Base Camp Setup
LOG BONFIRES
SCENIC VIEWS
SUNRISE CAMPS Spiti Valley
STARLIGHT
BRIEFINGS
TOGETHERNESS Romantic Escape

FAMILY TREK Manali Trails
ROHTANG PASS
FAMILY BONFIRE

FAMILY CATERING

  • ✦
    Daily Breakfast Warm Himachali breakfasts served each morning at the hotel.
  • ✦
    Lunch on Tour Mountain dhabas and local restaurants on sightseeing days.
  • ✦
    Evening Snacks & Tea Warm chai and snacks served by the bonfire each evening.
  • ✦
    Nightly Dinner Multi-cuisine family dinners at hotel restaurant — everyone's covered.

CAMP CATERING SERVICES

  • ✦
    Trail Refreshments Fresh forest fruits and energy chocolates for peak hiking trails.
  • ✦
    Hot Base Camp Lunch Wholesome traditional mountain lunches cooked fresh at camp kitchens.
  • ✦
    Evening Bonfire Tea & Snacks Cozy hot tea with local snacks served directly at the fire hearth.
  • ✦
    Luxury Campfire Dinner Lavish warm dinners under lantern glow on alpine river shores.
  • ✦
    Healthy Sunrise Breakfast Fresh sunrise breakfast brew with warm flatbreads and eggs.
Sinu TESTING IT

CAMPING SOLANG VALLEY

“Leave nothing but footprints, take nothing but memories.”

Trekking

Embark on a magnificent 2-hour guided trek scaling past green forests, alpine brooks, and high elevation mountain flora surrounding the valley camp.

Solang High Peaks

Nature & Adventure

Deep dive into pure unadulterated nature. Experience wild hiking ridges, evergreen coniferous woodlands, and local alpine mountain valleys.

Coniferous Ridge

Campfire

Gather around a cozy open crackling campfire log fire. Bond, share tales of mountain climbs, and enjoy absolute wilderness relaxation under star skies.

Warm Sunset logs

Scenic Views

Open your tent window to awe-inspiring layouts: snow peaks reaching into high blue sky clouds, crystalline pristine rivers, and mountain sunset glows.

Breathtaking Vibe

Relaxation

Disconnect from city noise and unwind to the quiet rustling of leaves, bird songs, and running river waters. Restore your mental energy.

Serene Retreat

Photography

Capture stunning compositions of alpine peaks, starry night heavens, bright bonfires, dynamic tents, and glowing sunbeams through pine needles.

Alpine Captures
Interactive Showcase

Sinu RETREAT REST

“Inspect our high-end glamping structures and adventure equipment in 3D WebGL”
EQUIPMENT SPECS

WebGL Inspector

Inspect our luxurious custom double-insulated Geodesic Dome. Featuring architectural reinforcement frame grids, transparent panoramic bay windows overlooking high pines, and central hearth climate integration.

DIAGNOSTICS: RUNNING
GEODESIC RETREAT DOME THERMAL GRID LOCKED
GRID SCALE 1:15 RENDER RES: 1080P
DRAG TO ROTATE & INSPECT
Premium Expedition Route

SOLANG VALLEY BASE PATHWAY

Immerse yourself in the breathtaking landscapes of the Himalayas. Our meticulously curated itineraries ensure every moment is filled with unparalleled luxury and comfort.

SOLANG PATH ANALYSIS

Your premium mountain camping journey begins with a smooth pickup from Delhi, driving northward past beautiful Himalayan ranges to Manali, before climbing into our base at Solang Valley.

Total Distance 543 KM
Travel Duration 12 - 13 Hrs
01

DELHI START

Starting assembly and pickup point

Pickup
02

MANALI (SOYAL)

Renush sh Homestay registration base

Assembly
03

SOLANG CAMP BASE

Glamping camp, bonfires & trails

Camping Base

SPITI EXPEDITION ROUTE

A magnificent high-altitude journey through the ancient Spiti Valley, passing through Shimla, Sangla, Kaza, Key Monastery, and breathtaking landscapes.

Total Distance 1,240 KM
Travel Loop 9 Full Days
01

DELHI TO SHIMLA

Day 1-2: Majestic foothills ascent

Gateway
02

KAZA (SPITI VALLEY)

Day 4-6: Monasteries & starry deserts

Desert Camp
03

KIBBER & CHICHAM BRIDGE

Day 6: Highest bridge crossing loop

Himalayan Peak

Romance Days 4 Luxury Days

The Owner
Renush

A synergy of survival expertise and premium vision. Renush founded this platform to bridge the gap between untamed wilderness and ultra-premium comfort.

DESIGNATION
CHIEF EXECUTIVE
PHILOSOPHY LUXURY IN SILENCE
The Wilderness Brand

ABOUT SOIL VILLAGE

Soil Village represents the absolute pinnacle of premium outdoor mountain glamping retreats. Secluded within the spectacular pine borders of Solang Valley, Manali, our camp base is an oasis designed to let you escape the chaotic speeds of modern city life.

We combine rugged alpine exploration trails, scenic mountain summits, and winding pristine rivers with cozy campfire logs, warm tea servings, comfortable tents, and starry night sky gazing to carve unforgettable memories.

Peaceful Mountain Escape
Camping & Adventure
Unforgettable Memories
Bonfire & Cozy Gatherings
Traveller Stories

WHAT OUR ADVENTURERS SAY

“

“Soil Village was an absolute dream. Camping on the river bank, waking up to massive pine mountains in Solang, and having a guide trail us through the ridges made Day 1 unbelievable. The campfire log fire was warm, cozy, and luxurious!”

AARAV SHARMA Delhi Resident • Visited April 2026
“

“The most serene mountain escape I've ever booked. Every detail on the itinerary poster was matched exactly. Food was incredibly fresh and delicious, particularly the hot dinner servings next to the bonfires. Truly majestic views.”

NEHA SINGHAL Tech Engineer • Visited May 2026
“

“Leave nothing but footprints, take nothing but memories! The 2-hour hiking ridges on Day 1 were breathtaking. The homestay transition at Renush sh Homestay in Soyal was smooth and warm. Extremely premium adventure booking.”

VIKRAM ADITYA Photographer • Visited March 2026
Candid Moments

WILDERNESS REELS

Captured live by our tribe

Secure Camp Stay

BOOK YOUR EXPEDITION

BOOKING NOTES

  • Package: Solang Valley Luxury camping (1 Night / 2 Days).
  • Transport: Comfortable Delhi assembly pick up included.
  • Meal Plan: Wholesome refreshments, lunch, evening tea, and lavish dinner bonfire.
  • Assembly: Guide pick up at Renush sh Homestay in Soyal.
  • Package: Spiti Valley Expedition Loop (8 Nights / 9 Days).
  • Transport: Luxury Tempo Traveller/SUV loop included from Delhi.
  • Meal Plan: Daily healthy breakfasts & camp multi-cuisine dinners.
  • Stays: Cozy Himalayan hotels & cold desert high-altitude camps.
  • Package: Honeymoon Peak Getaway (3 Nights / 4 Days).
  • Transport: Private Premium SUV loop from Delhi with private chauffeur.
  • Meal Plan: Luxury custom romantic catering (Breakfast in Bed, Wine, Candlelight feast).
  • Stays: Secluded Heated Geodesic Dome stay decorated with local organic flowers.
  • Package: Manali Family Tour (3 Nights / 4 Days – UPTO 50% OFF).
  • Transport: Volvo bus + local cab/tempo traveller transfers included.
  • Meal Plan: Daily breakfast & dinner at hotel; lunch at mountain dhabas on tour days.
  • Highlights: Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, Hidimba Temple, Mall Road & more.
LIMITED CAPACITY Only 12 glamping tents per week for crowd exclusion.

An ultra-premium mountain camping retreat situated in the heart of Solang Valley, Manali. Stay amidst winding rivers, snow peaks, and experience nature in pure luxury.
